sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28638" key="dusaisqhte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-αισθητέω</orth>, <sense id="n28638.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be hardly sensible</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
